subject: Accounting
title: Why Accounting Matters
description: A fast breakdown of Why Accounting Matters for builders.

hook.text: A bakery owner ignores her books for a year. She thinks she's profitable. She's not.

buildup.text: Without accounting, businesses fly blind. Revenue feels great until expenses eat it.

discovery.text: Proper records reveal the truth: which products profit and which bleed cash.

twist.text: Even governments collapse without good accounting—ancient Rome learned that the hard way.

climax.text: From a food truck to a Fortune 500, every operation needs to know its numbers.

punchline.text: You can't fix what you can't measure.

quiz.question: What risk do businesses face without proper accounting?
